# Eurocode Outline Fixture

This fixture is intentionally small but "structured enough" to trigger the build-time
structured outline detector (>=12 clause addresses), so we can test:

- `:clause:<addr>` node IDs (address-as-primary-key)
- hierarchical parent chain creation
- `:table:<id>` extraction and parent_id linkage
- runtime bundle auto-includes table/figure children for clause hits
